message:
fix(mobile): restore missing bottom sheet animation rules

Critical fix: Accidentally removed .is-open rules for backdrop opacity
and container transform during mobile performance optimizations.

Without these rules, the bottom sheet would not properly animate
when opening (backdrop would always be at opacity 0, container would
stay at translateY(100%)).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
